notes: 64-bit RISC; 143/167/200MHz at launch; 2x power, 5x bandwidth, 20% latency vs SPARC; succeeded by SPARC64
SunOS-based Unix; SMP-tuned; Solaris open-sourced as OpenSolaris; Oracle Solaris still maintained
Launched 1995; JavaSoft subsidiary; Aberdeen noted Java 'taking ISV community by storm' in 1996
Internet/e-commerce focused servers; easy setup for remote locations; enhanced for electronic commerce in March 1996
Universal networking protocol; Sun's commercial positioning tied to internet/TCP-IP growth
6 new UltraSPARC-based commercial servers announced April 1996; totally new design inside and out
